data.body: E1 DONE (commit c64c8892). cli.py:main now delegates to rebar._cli.main (3-line facade); bash dispatcher reachable only via category-B transitional passthrough. Live-verified through the real rebar binary on this repo's store: help/overview byte-parity, category-A reads+writes in-process, category-B passthrough (fsck), unknown-subcommand exit 1, fsck clean. Gates: full non-integration suite 1652 passed; isolated full-surface probe 141/141. The live rebar CLI is now the argparse path.
